name: Mozilla Board Games Structured QA
description: Board game rules Q&A subset inspired by Mozilla structured QA format. Questions cover common board game mechanics, setup, and scoring rules.

samples.question: How many settlement pieces does each player start with in Catan?
samples.expected_answer: Each player starts with 5 settlement pieces.

samples.question: What resource cards are needed to build a road in Catan?
samples.expected_answer: One brick and one lumber are needed to build a road.

samples.question: When a 7 is rolled in Catan, what happens to players with more than 7 resource cards?
samples.expected_answer: Players with more than 7 resource cards must discard half of their resource cards (rounded down).

samples.question: How many victory points are needed to win a standard game of Catan?
samples.expected_answer: 10 victory points are needed to win.

samples.question: What is the longest road bonus in Catan and how many victory points is it worth?
samples.expected_answer: The Longest Road card is awarded to the first player to build a continuous road of at least 5 segments. It is worth 2 victory points.

samples.question: In Ticket to Ride, how many train car cards does each player draw at the start?
samples.expected_answer: Each player draws 4 train car cards at the start of the game.

samples.question: How many destination ticket cards does a player keep during initial selection in Ticket to Ride?
samples.expected_answer: Each player is dealt 3 destination tickets and must keep at least 2 of them.

samples.question: What happens when a player claims a route in Ticket to Ride?
samples.expected_answer: The player places plastic trains on the route spaces and discards the matching train car cards used to claim it.

samples.question: How does the game end in Ticket to Ride?
samples.expected_answer: The game ends when any player's stock of colored plastic trains gets down to 0, 1, or 2 trains. Each player then gets one final turn.

samples.question: In Pandemic, how many actions does a player get per turn?
samples.expected_answer: Each player gets 4 actions per turn.

samples.question: What happens during an outbreak in Pandemic?
samples.expected_answer: When a city already has 3 disease cubes of the same color and would receive another, an outbreak occurs. Each adjacent city receives 1 cube of that color, which can trigger chain outbreaks.

samples.question: How many epidemic cards are used in a standard difficulty Pandemic game?
samples.expected_answer: A standard difficulty game uses 4 epidemic cards. Introductory uses 4, standard uses 5, and heroic uses 6.

samples.question: In Carcassonne, when can you place a meeple on a tile?
samples.expected_answer: You can place a meeple on a tile only when you place that tile, and only if the feature (road, city, field, or monastery) is not already claimed by another meeple.

samples.question: How is a completed city scored in Carcassonne?
samples.expected_answer: A completed city scores 2 points per tile in the city, plus 2 points per pennant (coat of arms) in the city.

samples.question: In Azul, what happens to leftover tiles at the end of a round?
samples.expected_answer: Leftover tiles that were not placed on pattern lines are placed on the floor line, which causes negative points during scoring.

samples.question: How many tiles does a factory display have in Azul?
samples.expected_answer: Each factory display contains exactly 4 tiles drawn randomly from the bag.

samples.question: What triggers the end of an Azul game?
samples.expected_answer: The game ends at the end of the round in which at least one player has completed a horizontal row of 5 consecutive tiles on their wall.

samples.question: In 7 Wonders, how many cards does each player receive in the first age?
samples.expected_answer: Each player receives 7 cards at the beginning of each age.

samples.question: How does card drafting work in 7 Wonders?
samples.expected_answer: Each player selects one card from their hand, plays it simultaneously, then passes the remaining cards to the next player. Direction alternates by age.

samples.question: Can you trade with the bank in Catan, and at what ratio?
samples.expected_answer: Yes, you can trade 4 identical resource cards for 1 resource card of any type with the bank. With a harbor, the ratio can be 3:1 (general) or 2:1 (specific resource).

samples.question: What are the winning conditions in Pandemic?
samples.expected_answer: Players win by discovering cures for all 4 diseases. They do not need to eradicate the diseases, only cure them.

samples.question: How many player cards must you collect of the same color to discover a cure in Pandemic?
samples.expected_answer: You need 5 player cards of the same color to discover a cure. You must also be at a research station to perform this action.

samples.question: What is the maximum hand size in Pandemic and what happens when exceeded?
samples.expected_answer: The maximum hand size is 7 cards. If at any point a player has more than 7 cards, they must immediately discard down to 7.

samples.question: In Carcassonne, how are incomplete features scored at the end of the game?
samples.expected_answer: Incomplete cities score 1 point per tile and 1 point per pennant. Incomplete roads score 1 point per tile. Monasteries score 1 point for the monastery tile plus 1 point for each surrounding tile.

samples.question: How many development cards can you buy per turn in Catan?
samples.expected_answer: You can buy as many development cards as you can afford per turn, but you can only play one development card per turn.
